tasks.subject: Task 1: isEditUiEnabled config helper (default on)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A testable helper that defaults to enabled and is disabled only by EDIT_UI_ENABLED=false (case-insensitive).

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/config.ts`
- Test: `tests/unit/config.edit-ui.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Unset → true; 'false'/'FALSE' → false; 'true'/other → true
- [ ] Accepts an injectable env object (no process.env mutation in tests)

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/config.edit-ui.test.ts` → PASS.

**Steps:** TDD — RED (not a function); implement `env.EDIT_UI_ENABLED?.toLowerCase() !== "false"` with injectable env param (mirror isOidcConfigured); GREEN; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/config.ts", "tests/unit/config.edit-ui.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/config.edit-ui.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["unset=true", "false/FALSE=false", "true/other=true", "injectable env"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Gate Edit button behind EDIT_UI_ENABLED + docs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The document page passes editEnabled into DocumentView, which hides the Edit button when false; the var is documented.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/app/documents/[id]/page.tsx` (compute + pass editEnabled)
- Modify: `components/DocumentView.tsx` (accept prop; gate Edit button)
- Modify: `.env.example`, `README.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] EDIT_UI_ENABLED=false hides Edit button for owner; default shows it
- [ ] No other path reaches edit mode when flag off
- [ ] .env.example + README document the var (UI-only, default on)
- [ ] tsc + lint clean; selectors unchanged

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && CI=true pnpm exec next lint` clean; manual toggle.

**Steps:** import+compute isEditUiEnabled() in server page, pass editEnabled prop; extend DocumentView signature; gate `{mode==="review" && editEnabled && <Edit/>}`; grep for other setMode('edit'); add .env.example block + README line; verify; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/app/documents/[id]/page.tsx", "components/DocumentView.tsx", ".env.example", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && CI=true pnpm exec next lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["flag off hides Edit button", "default shows it", "no other edit-mode entry", "docs updated"]}
```
